stemHtml: Which statement about the satellites (that transmit the corrections to the users) of a Satellite Based Augmentation System (SBAS) is correct?

options.a: These satellites form a part of the constellation of the navigation satellites i.e. they have the same inclination and altitude as these satellites and can be used as navigation satellites to which pseudo-ranges can be measured.
options.b: These satellites are geostationary and determine the corrections independently from a ground station network.
options.c: These satellites form a part of the constellation of the navigation satellites i.e. they have the same inclination and altitude but cannot be used as navigation satellites as they transmit the correction in a different frequency band.
options.d: These geostationary satellites can also be used as navigation satellites to which pseudo-ranges can be measured.
